text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Mile Championship is finally here. Hoping to
make it a perfect finale, Fine Motion swears to
put in a performance that will remain in the hearts
of everyone who watches.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess declares that, as Fine Motion's
rival, she won't be holding anything back. Fine
Motion herself has no intention of ceding victory
either.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just who will emerge victorious from this
so-called "princess showdown"? The battle to find
out begins now!
